title: Fox Warns of US Military Intervention — Calls on Sheinbaum to Act Against Cartels
detail: Former President Vicente Fox issues stark warnings about potential US military intervention in Mexico amid escalating pressure from the Trump administration over cartel activity. Fox suggests Mexico could hand over a PRI or Morena governor as a 'narcopolitician' to the US to protect sovereignty, citing the precedent of the Kiki Camarena DEA agent assassination operation in which US agents illegally operated on Mexican soil. Fox calls on President Claudia Sheinbaum to abandon 'evasive attitudes' and take decisive anti-cartel action: '¡Llegó la hora de actuar, Claudia!' (The time has come to act, Claudia!). Fox's warnings echo the security challenges that reshaped his own presidency after 9/11 derailed his landmark 2001 US-Mexico immigration framework with Bush.

media.caption: Fox warns of US intervention risk amid Trump pressure on Mexican cartels
